text:
GOVERNMENT OF INDIA
MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS
OFFICE OF THE REGISTRAR OF COMPANIES
Dated : 16-08-2021
NOTE - THIS LETTER IS ONLY AN APPROVAL FOR REGISTRATION OF THE
ENTITIES FOR UNDERTAKING CSR ACTIVITIES.
To,
Indian Institute of Technology Jammu , Jagti, NH-44,PO
Nagrota,Jammu,JK05,JK,194101
PAN : AABTI4921M
Subject: In Reference to Registration of Entities for undertaking CSR activities
Reference: Your application dated 16-08-2021 (SRN-T35703305)
Sir/Madam,
With reference to the above, it is informed that the entity has been registered for undertaking
CSR activities and the Registration number is CSR00013197. Please refer the registration
number for any further communication.
Registrar of Companies
ROC-DELHI
Note: The corresponding form has been approved and this letter has been digitally signed
through a system generated digital signature.

Donate Online

CSR Registration Certificate

IIT Jammu welcomes friends and well-wishers to partner in our journey to support the growth and development. The generous and continuous support received shall be used for funding some of the campaigns and the cause chosen by you. We have a few of our own thrust areas inlined with our motto "Learn, Engage, Invent, Create impact". You may like to donate to any one of the causes where the funding is targetted. Your contribution, however small and large shall enrich IIT Jammu. The activities includeAcademic Programmes (UG, PG, PhD), Research, Innovation and Outreach. We also look forward to create new Centers of Expertise (leading to excellence) and towards young Faculty Fellowships. With you support we look forward to make IIT Jammu as an attractive place to work with.

If you are visiting Jammu or plan to visit Jammu, do visit our scenic campus at Jagti, Jammu.Interact with IIT Jammu community. We will be happy to host you.

For any of your queries please do not hesitate to reach out to us: donations [AT] iitjammu [DOT] ac [DOT] in

**Note**: For contributions towards CSR, please contact registrar [AT] iitjammu [DOT] ac [DOT] in | Registration number is **CSR00013197**

# List of Holidays-2026

| SI.No. | Holidays | Date | Day of Week |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1. | Republic Day | January, 26 | Monday |
| 2. | Holi | March, 04 | Wednesday |
| 3. | Id-ul-Fitr* | March, 21 | Saturday |
| 4. | Mahavir Jayanti | March, 31 | Tuesday |
| 5. | Good Friday | April, 03 | Friday |
| 6. | Buddha Purnima | May, 01 | Friday |
| 7. | Id-ul-Zuha (Bakrid)* | May, 27 | Wednesday |
| 8. | Muharram* | June, 26 | Friday |
| 9. | Independence Day | August, 15 | Saturday |
| 10. | Milad-un-Nabi or Id-e-Milad (Birthday of Prophet Mohammad)* | August, 26 | Wednesday |
| 11. | Janamashtmi | September, 04 | Friday |
| 12. | Mahatama Gandhi's Birthday | October, 02 | Friday |
| 13. | An additional day for Dussehra | October, 19 | Monday |
| 14. | Dussehra | October, 20 | Tuesday |
| 15. | Diwali | November, 08 | Sunday |
| 16. | Govardhan Puja | November, 09 | Monday |
| 17. | Bhai Duj | November, 11 | Wednesday |
| 18. | Guru Nanak's Birthday | November, 24 | Tuesday |
| 19. | Christmas Day | December, 25 | Friday |

*In the event of change in the date(s) of the above holiday(s) announced by the Govt. of India through the media (TV/AIR/Newspaper etc.) on account of the appearance of the Moon, then the Institute shall automatically observe the subject holiday(s) accordingly and no notice in this regard shall be issued.

### PRISM - Student Media Body

PRISM (Promoting, Reporting, Inspiring, Showcasing, Media) is the official Student Media Body of IIT Jammu, serving as the creative and communicative backbone of the institute. With a mission to amplify the institute’s essence through impactful storytelling, PRISM plays a key role in enhancing visibility and engagement across platforms.
